item.name: 09. Flow: Denda Belum Lunas → Bulk Payment

exec: pm.environment.set("_bulk_body", JSON.stringify({ transaksi_ids: [parseInt(tid)], jumlah_bayar: 100000, user_id: parseInt(uid) }));
